rent.note: furnished 1BR villa/apt in Canggu or Ubud; Canggu 12M-18M IDR, Ubud 8M-14M IDR; midpoint

utilities.note: electric (A/C heavy) + water + internet; Bali electric can be expensive

groceries.note: local warungs + Pepito/Bintang markets; warungs $250/mo vs Western $700/mo

diningOut.note: mix of warung ($2-4/meal) + nomad-friendly cafes in Canggu

transit.note: scooter rental ~$50-80/mo or Grab; Canggu requires transport

simData.note: Telkomsel/XL Axiata unlimited data SIM ~150,000-200,000 IDR/mo

misc.note: gym, Bali-specific health ins, yoga, entertainment, massage, personal care

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.quote: Canggu saw 2026 asking rents hit 12 million to 18 million rupiah for a one-bedroom villa with pool. Ubud's jungle calm costs 8 million to 14 million for similar square footage

evidence.claim: Bali nomad total monthly $900-1,500 most spend; $1,500 budget to $3,500 premium
evidence.quote: Most digital nomads spend USD 900–1,500 per month, though monthly costs range from $1,500 for a budget lifestyle to $3,500+ for premium living
Puco Rooftop in Canggu is one of the most affordable options at $154 per month

evidence.claim: Eating mostly at warungs costs $250/month vs $700+ at Western restaurants
evidence.quote: Eating mostly at warungs costs $250/month versus $700+ at Western restaurants
